title: centaurea pontica
intro: Centaurea pontica, a flowering plant species in the daisy family, is native to the Balkan Peninsula and is also known as Pontic cornflower or Pontic knapweed. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea pontica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make herbal supplements or added to food and beverages for its potential health benefits.
